title: psychotria polycarpa
intro: Psychotria polycarpa, also known as the many-fruited psychotria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. Its health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infused in oil for topical use, or taken as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
